item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 040830Z AUTO 25014KT 220V290 9999 BKN022 BKN027 BKN070 17/12 Q1007 TEMPO 24015G30KT 4000 -SHRA BKN013TCU
